task_completion.description: Open and read the aquaculture site evaluation brief.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of 'aquaculture_site_evaluation.txt' with the candidate site coordinates.

task_completion.description: Open the NOAA SST climatology netCDF file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A data visualization tool (like Panoply) or a script/terminal output showing the loaded 'sst.ltm.1991-2020.nc' file and the 'sst' variable.

task_completion.description: Export the Austral Summer (February) SST map.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A plot window or file manager showing a generated map of February SST saved as 'sst_austral_summer_feb.png' in the ~/Documents/Aquaculture/ directory.

task_completion.description: Export the Austral Winter (August) SST map.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A plot window or file manager showing a generated map of August SST saved as 'sst_austral_winter_aug.png' in the ~/Documents/Aquaculture/ directory.

task_completion.description: Create the thermal viability report with extracted temperatures and classifications.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing 'thermal_viability_report.txt' containing the extracted February temperatures for the three sites (Perth ~22C, Tasmania ~16C, Magallanes ~9C) and classifying Perth as TOO_HOT/Not Viable, and Tasmania/Magallanes as VIABLE.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the netCDF file to get the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent using a tool like Panoply, ncview, or a Python script to inspect the .nc file, rather than just hallucinating the report.

integrity.description: Verify the maps were actually generated from the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of the agent configuring plots (e.g., setting time to February/August, adjusting color scales) in a visualization tool before saving the PNGs.

integrity.description: Verify the report contains specific extracted values, not just generic text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final report must include the actual numeric temperature values extracted from the dataset for each coordinate, proving the agent performed the extraction step.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset is the NOAA OI SST v2 Long-Term Mean. The variable is 'sst'. The task requires evaluating February (Austral Summer, month index 1). Extracted values to look for in the final report: Perth (-32S, 115E) is ~22.08-22.38 °C (Classification: TOO_HOT / Not Viable); Tasmania (-43S, 147E) is ~15.77-17.11 °C (Classification: VIABLE); Magallanes (-53S, 75W/285E) is ~9.07-9.88 °C (Classification: VIABLE). Expected outputs are sst_austral_summer_feb.png, sst_austral_winter_aug.png, and thermal_viability_report.txt in ~/Documents/Aquaculture/.
